snippet.title: Yves Saint Laurent Libre Intense Eau de Parfum | Amber Floral Women’s Fragrance
snippet.description:
Yves Saint Laurent Libre Intense Eau de Parfum | Amber Floral Women’s Fragrance  

Notes: Lavender, Orange Blossom, Vanilla, Amber.  
A bold amber floral with rich warmth, sensual depth, and powerful presence.  

Would you wear this daily or for special occasions?
